Logo
Replace the MR placeholder circles with the official bronze medallion SVG. The asset is sacred — do not recolour, resize disproportionately, or alter it.
QR code
Generate a real QR code pointing to menrush.com/pride using qr.io or similar. Export at 300dpi minimum. Replace both placeholder SVGs above.
Print spec
A5 (148×210mm), A6 (148×105mm). CMYK. 3mm bleed. 300dpi. Near-black prints as 100K or rich black (60C 40M 40Y 100K) — confirm with printer.
URL / redirect
Set up menrush.com/pride as a Vercel redirect to the waitlist with a UTM: ?utm_source=flier&utm_campaign=brighton-pride-26
